name: Global Settings
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can configure system-wide operational parameters through global settings that control default behaviors, business rules, and functional preferences across all "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": " retail locations. Properly configured global settings help ensure consistent operational standards throughout your retail network while establishing appropriate defaults for inventory management, customer data, pricing rules, and transaction processing."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Understanding global settings helps retail operators establish consistent business policies across all locations while maintaining the flexibility to override settings at the outlet level when location-specific requirements exist."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Global Settings area controls the general settings within Retail Express, including Address information, Purchase Order colours and standard Label Printer Settings."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Global Settings are the "}, {"text": "default ", "italic": true}, {"text": "settings. If you need varying details for each store this can be done by editing the Outlet details - refer to the "}, {"text": "System Settings - Outlets"}, {"text": " article for more information)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To access Global Settings navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings > Global Settings", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, store."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Ticking this option enables the customer account statements to be populated with details relating to the customer Home Outlet, rather than Global
